task: Open the page with an overview of the submission of releases on Discogs.
final_result_response:
The page "**Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases**" is now open on Discogs. It is located under **Discogs > Database & Contributing > Database Guidelines** and was posted by Discogs Community Support. The page covers basic guidelines for submitting releases to the Discogs database, including:

- Having the exact release in front of you when entering it
- Only entering verifiable information with trustworthy sources
- Properly linking artist and label pages
- Using Artist Name Variations (ANV)
- Capitalizing names and titles correctly
- Following the Quick Start Guide for new contributors
